## Summary
Describe the capability and who benefits.

## Problem Statement
What current limitation does this solve?

## Proposed Solution
Describe your preferred approach.

## Acceptance Criteria
List concrete conditions for done.

## AGENTS.md References
List sections this change touches.

## Additional Context
Links, examples, alternatives, benchmark expectations.
